name: @inksphere/aide
description: Turn an agentic CLI into your personal assistant.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outdir dist --entry-naming cli.js --minify && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.release:minor: bun pm version minor && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:patch: bun pm version patch && git push --follow-tags
